entry.title: Levenshtein distance algorithm
entry.content:
Fuzzy Search and Levenshtein Algorithm

Have you ever wondered how similar two words are? How many changes do you need to make to turn one word into another? For example, how many letters do you need to swap to turn “Sowrd” into “Sword”? That’s the question that the Levenshtein Distance can answer.

The Levenshtein Distance is a way of comparing how similar two words are. It counts how many changes you need to make to one word to get the other word. For example, to change “Male” to “Mace”, you only need to change one letter, so the Levenshtein Distance is 1. To change “Sowrd” to “Sword”, you need to change two letters, so the Levenshtein Distance is 2. This algorithm was invented by a Russian scientist named Vladimir Levenshtein. The store was part of a game that was aimed for 9–15-year-olds, so I had to make sure that the search function was robust and user-friendly. This meant that I had to handle cases where the users would misspell or omit letters in the words they were looking for. At first, I tried to simply match the input string with the weapon names in the store, but this approach was too rigid and failed to account for the variations in spelling. I realized that I needed a more sophisticated way to measure the similarity between two strings, and that’s when I discovered the Fuzzy Search and the Levenshtein Distance algorithm.

Fuzzy search is a technique used in information retrieval and text searching to find results that are approximately, rather than exactly, matching a search query. It is particularly useful when dealing with data that may contain errors, misspellings, or variations in spelling and formatting. One of the fundamental algorithms used for fuzzy search is Levenshtein distance algorithm. The benefits of using Levenshtein distance algorithm is search result precision, customization of search and simplicity. When you compare two strings, the lower the Levenshtein Distance, the more similar the two strings are. I decided to use this algorithm as the basis for my search function, and I learned how to implement it in my code. This was a great opportunity for me to apply my computer science knowledge to a real-world problem and to improve my coding skills. Below I will detail my attempt at implementing the Levenshtein distance algorithm into my code:

local function levenshteinDistance(str1, str2)
    local len1, len2 = #str1, #str2
    local dp = {}

First, I define a function levenshteinDistance that takes in two parameters str1, and str2 which are both strings. It then assigns the variables len1 and len2 to the number of characters each string has. The # modifier calculates how many characters are within the strings that go through the function. For example, if the string sword was passed through the function, it would calculate that the length of that string is 5 The function then defines a table call dp which is a common variable name used in the establishment of the Levenshtein algorithm.

for i = 0, len1 do
        dp[i] = {}
        for j = 0, len2 do
            if i == 0 then
                dp[i][j] = j
            elseif j == 0 then
                dp[i][j] = i
            else

This code creates a table with rows and columns that represent parts of the sequences. Each cell in the table shows how many operations are needed for those parts. The code fills in the table by starting from the top left corner and moving right and down. It uses simple rules to calculate the values in the table based on the letters at the current positions and the values in the previous cells. The value at dp[i][j] represents the Levenshtein distance between the first i characters of s1 and the first j characters of s2.

local cost = str1:sub(i, i) ~= str2:sub(j, j) and 1 or 0
                dp[i][j] = math.min(dp[i - 1][j] + 1, dp[i][j - 1] + 1, dp[i - 1][j - 1] + cost)
            end
        end
    end

    return dp[len1][len2]
end

We iterate through the matrix to fill it in, using the recurrence relation for the Levenshtein distance: dp[i][j] is the minimum of three possible operations

Finally, the bottom-right cell of the matrix (dp[len_s1][len_s2]) contains the Levenshtein distance between the entire strings s1 and s2. I hope you enjoyed reading about Levenshtein distance algorithm and learned something new along the way.

```
entry.summary: Enhancing User Experience in Space Nights Store: Leveraging the Levenshtein Distance Algorithm for Precise Spell Check Solutions

entry.title: Level Creation for Roblox Game
entry.content:
Designing a level

Designing a level for a game on the Roblox platform was a challenging task for me. I initially thought that creating a level is to add different buildings in different locations. However, I soon realized that there were many factors to consider when creating a level that would attract and retain players. One of the most important aspects of level design was the placement of buildings. I had to decide where to put each building, how many of them to use, and what orientation they should have. I also had to make sure that the buildings made sense in the context of the game world and the gameplay. For example, I had to place the hospital, the storage centers, the city building and the power generators in locations that were logical and convenient for the players. I also had to align them with the roads and other elements of the environment. I experimented with different layouts to test the effect on the player experience. I had to consider things like visibility, accessibility, navigation, interaction, and immersion. The challenge was the player’s navigation. They should be able to see the buildings clearly, reach them easily, move around them smoothly, interact with them meaningfully, and feel immersed in them in a realistic way.

Above is the before pic of one of the sections made for the game.

Once I had the layout done ,I shared it with other players and testers. I got valuable feedback that helped me improve my design. They liked the variety of buildings, the aesthetic appeal, and the gameplay balance of the level.They pointed out issues that I had overlooked, such as collision detection, lighting effects, sound effects, and performance optimization.

Above is the after pic of one of the sections made for the game after taking in the feedback offered by my peers.

This journey taught me about player retention and level design. I learned how to balance aesthetics and functionality, how to create a coherent and immersive game world, and how to use feedback and testing to improve my work. I also learned how to use the Roblox platform effectively, as it offered many tools and resources that helped me create my level. I learned how to use the Roblox Studio editor, the Roblox scripting language Lua, the Roblox asset library, and the Roblox community forums.

```
entry.summary: Enhancing User Experience in Space Nights Game: Creating an intresting enviorment for players to expereince

entry.title: Strategies for Winning at Splendor
entry.content:
–

Strategies for Winning at Splendor

Splendor is a board game where players embark on the journey of building a jewelry empire and winning the favor of the noble class. The game involves utilizing development cards, gem tokens and noble tiles. The ultimate goal is to accumulate prestige points as possible by obtaining development cards and impressing nobles to join your cause.

Basic Tips for Playing Splendor

Before we dive into the strategies, let’s go over some basic tips to help you get started: To become an expert gem collector you must gather gems in order to purchase cards. These cards are essential for acquiring cards, earning points and ultimately acquiring Nobles for additional bonus points. During a player’s turn they have the option to select two gems of the same color if there are at least four of that color remaining. Alternatively they can choose one gem from three colors. Additionally players receive a gem that can be used as any color when reserving a card they are unable or choose not to buy immediately.

Understanding the objective in Splendor; When you first start playing Splendor it’s tempting to prioritize collecting gems and cards to create a gem card engine. The game encourages this approach especially when you’re still learning. However it’s essential not to lose sight of Splendors goal. Despite its simplicity the winner is not determined by who builds the impressive engine; instead it is the player who reaches a minimum of 15 points first.

Strategies for Winning at Splendor:

## Strategy 1: Reserve Cards You Want Early On One effective tactic in card games is to reserve your desired cards ensuring you acquire them before your opponents have a chance. This approach becomes particularly advantageous when you aim to construct a combination centered around colors or card types. By reserving a card you remove it from the playing area. Place it in front of yourself preventing your rivals from purchasing it. Additionally reserving a card allows you to hold onto it for use if you currently lack gems to make the purchase.

## Strategy 2: Take 3 Chips in Early Turns During the stages of the game it’s often advisable to opt for acquiring three chips or directly purchasing a card. This approach enables you to swiftly accumulate a collection of gems and grants you flexibility in stages. These chips can be utilized either to acquire cards or to save up for the purchase of a noble tile.

## Strategy 3: Choose Two Colors That You Will Own and Buy Them Up One effective strategy for acquiring the cards you desire and impeding your opponents is to select two colors and purchase them exclusively. By concentrating on obtaining all the cards in those chosen colors, such as blue and green you can accumulate a number of points while simultaneously limiting your opponents access to those colors.

## Strategy 4: Keep Track of Your Opponents’ Cards It’s crucial to keep tabs on your opponents cards while playing Splendor. By knowing which cards they are aiming for you can strategically hinder their progress by purchasing those cards before them or reserving them for yourself. Additionally this knowledge allows you to anticipate which nobles they are pursuing and attempt to attract them before your opponents have the chance to do so.

Conclusion

Splendor is a game that demands meticulous planning and strategic thought. By adhering to these strategies and suggestions you’ll make progress, towards establishing a jewelry empire and garnering the admiration of the noble class.

–
entry.summary: A blog about the strategys to win Splendor
